prompt: The ERP has been running for a while. Run /setup check-health to verify everything is working correctly.

assertions.text: Skill runs check-db and reports DB connectivity
Skill runs check-alembic and reports Alembic revision
Skill runs check-tables and reports table existence
Skill runs check-users and reports user count
Skill runs check-legacy and reports legacy batch count
Skill summarizes all checks in a single health summary
